task_completion.description: Verify that desktop alerts for new messages are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird Settings (General tab), the checkbox for 'Show an alert' under the incoming mail/new messages section should be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the notification sound is set to use a custom file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird Settings, the radio button for 'Use the following sound file' must be selected instead of the default system sound.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct custom sound file is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text box or file path next to 'Use the following sound file' must show 'urgent_chime.wav'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the message preview text is hidden for HIPAA compliance, while sender and subject remain visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Customize New Mail Alert' dialog (accessed via the Customize button next to 'Show an alert'), the checkbox for 'Message Preview Text' must be UNCHECKED, while 'Sender' and 'Subject' remain CHECKED.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'URGENT LABS' tag has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird Settings under the Tags section, a tag exactly named 'URGENT LABS' must be visible in the list of tags.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'URGENT LABS' tag is colored Red.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tags list, the color block or text color associated with the 'URGENT LABS' tag must be Red.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Thunderbird GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Thunderbird application and its Settings tabs/dialogs, not a terminal window editing 'prefs.js' or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with genuine Thunderbird dialog boxes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Customize New Mail Alert' dialog and Tag creation/editing dialogs should match standard Thunderbird UI elements, not mocked up text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of python scripts or bash scripts being run in a terminal to set Mozilla user preferences directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom sound file must be exactly 'urgent_chime.wav'. The custom tag name must be exactly 'URGENT LABS' and colored Red. For HIPAA compliance, the message preview must be explicitly disabled (unchecked) in the desktop alert settings, while keeping the alert itself enabled and the sender/subject visible.
